presentation: A 34-year-old woman presents to the emergency department with 3 days of fever (39.2°C), dysuria, and right flank pain. She has no significant medical history. On examination, she has right costovertebral angle tenderness...
labs: WBC 14,200 with left shift. Urinalysis: positive leukocyte esterase, nitrites, >100 WBC/hpf, many bacteria. Cr 0.9.
